execution_analysis.suggested_action: normalize coordinates from IR and regenerate the affected lines
evidence_lines: ***** FATAL: Could not process input files.

repair_recommendation.suggested_action: normalize coordinates from IR and regenerate the affected lines

preconditions: apply the recommended repair at the routed stage
regenerate downstream artifacts from the corrected IR before rerun
rerun mission.exe only after the regenerated script passes static verification

repaired_text:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

platform_type LUNAR_ORBITER_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_INTEGRATING_SPACE_MOVER
   end_mover
end_platform_type

platform lunar_orbiter LUNAR_ORBITER_TYPE
   side blue
   route
      position 0n 0e altitude 100 km speed 1500 m/sec
      position 0n 90e altitude 100 km speed 1500 m/sec
      position 0n 180e altitude 100 km speed 1500 m/sec
      position 0n 90w altitude 100 km speed 1500 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/lunar_orbiter_scenario.aer
end_event_pipe

end_time 3600 sec
